name: Beef and Vegetable Loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Lightly pack the mixture into a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour, or until thoroughly cooked.
4. Drain liquid from the loaf.
5. Let the loaf stand for 10 minutes before slicing.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
